claims.claim: Dieting is not equal to starving. In reality, dieting is what you eat daily, meals that are adequate, balanced, suited to your calorie needs nutrient dense with favourite foods in moderation.
Scramble eggs are bad for weight loss, fried eggs are good and hard boiled eggs are excellent
Flavoured yogurt is bad for weight loss, plain yogurt is good for weight loss, greek yogurt is excellent
Rib eye steak is bad for weight loss, new york strip is good and sirloin is excellent for weight loss
Fried rice is bad for weight loss, white rice is good, cauliflower rice is excellent
Cheddar cheese is bad for weight loss, fetta cheese is good, cottage cheese is excellent for weight loss
Fried chicken is bad for weight loss, rotisserie chicken is good and grilled chicken breast is excellent for weight loss
The calories in brown rice and the calories in white rice are literally the same and there is no huge difference when it comes to consuming rice for weight loss
4 worst foods to eat for lunch: Lunchable packages, frozen oven baked pizzas, spam, ramen noodles
Frozen food options have the same nutritional value and are more budget friendly than fresh foods

Snacking is healthy and necessary and building balanced snacks is not complicated

Eating fruits after meals obstructs digestion
A balanced diet should be 40% fruits and veggies, 25% proteins, 25% fibre rich and 10% fats
Eating better will make you feel better and and that will be what you crave
All foods can fit as part of a healthy diet and this includes your fries, pizza and cake. Rather than restricting and removing add more nutrient rich foods to it
To manage cravings, sleep well, stay hydrated, eat more fibre, eat more protein and keep busy
Five foods to avoid on an empty stomach are coffee, yogurt, raw vegetables, citrus fruits and high sugar foods
